text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. This will go a long way
toward brightening up the student council office.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Look how well-made it is... It perfectly captures
the Umamusume's most distinctive features.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: This is making me curious to examine the others...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I should come back again by myself.
